claim: For all positive real x and y, x + y >= 2 sqrt(x y).
success_criteria: Transforms the inequality into an equivalent nonnegative square or performs a valid symbolic proof.
Optionally attempts counterexample search and finds none within encoded assumptions.
failure_modes: Uses Z3 nonlinear real arithmetic without checking solver limitations.
prompt: Check whether the claim 'for all positive real x and y, x + y >= 2 sqrt(x y)' can be refuted or symbolically validated under the stated assumptions.
